title: phlegmariurus dentatus
intro: Phlegmariurus dentatus, a species of flowering plant in the lycopodiaceae family, is a type of club moss. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus dentatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, bronchitis, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas and infusions, as well as in tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
